name: HARLEY-DAVIDSON, INC.
business: Harley-Davidson designs, manufactures, and sells motorcycles, parts, accessories, and apparel through the HDMC segment, and provides financial services through the HDFS segment. The LiveWire segment sells electric motorcycles and related products. Products are sold globally through a network of independent dealers and directly to consumers via eCommerce in certain markets.

exposures.sentence: LiveWire is an all-electric motorcycle brand with a focus on pioneering the two-wheel electric motorcycle space.

catalysts.sentence: The Company plans to announce its new strategic plan in conjunction with its first quarter 2026 earnings release.
